mapper.select: SELECT memberid AS memberId, name AS name, birth_date AS birthDate, email AS email, phone AS phone, gender AS gender, community_company_name AS communityCompanyName FROM tbl_member WHERE memberid = #{memberId}

SELECT R.resume_id AS resumeId, R.photo_path AS photoPath, R.fk_region_code AS regionCode, R.fk_category_id AS categoryId, R.desired_salary AS desiredSalary, RG.region_name AS regionName, JC.category_name AS categoryName FROM tbl_resume R LEFT JOIN tbl_region RG ON R.fk_region_code = RG.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON R.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE R.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND R.is_primary = 1 AND R.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_member SET name = #{name}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, gender = #{gender}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE memberid = #{memberId}
UPDATE tbl_member SET password = #{encodedPassword}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE memberid = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_application WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND application_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_application WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND application_status = 0 AND process_status IN (0, 1, 3)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_offer_response WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND viewed_at IS NULL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.application_id AS "id", P.title AS "postTitle", C.company_name AS "companyName", TO_CHAR(A.applied_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS "appliedAt", CASE A.process_status WHEN 0 THEN 'UNREAD' WHEN 1 THEN 'READ' WHEN 3 THEN 'UNDER_REVIEW' ELSE 'READ' END AS "status" FROM tbl_job_application A JOIN tbl_job_posting P ON A.fk_job_id = P.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON P.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid WHERE A.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND A.application_status = 0 ORDER BY A.applied_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT V.fk_job_id AS "id", P.title AS "title", C.company_name AS "companyName", CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) = TRUNC(V.viewed_at) AND FLOOR((SYSDATE - V.viewed_at) * 24 * 60) < 1 THEN '방금 전' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) = TRUNC(V.viewed_at) AND FLOOR((SYSDATE - V.viewed_at) * 24) < 1 THEN FLOOR((SYSDATE - V.viewed_at) * 24 * 60) || '분 전' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) = TRUNC(V.viewed_at) THEN FLOOR((SYSDATE - V.viewed_at) * 24) || '시간 전' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(V.viewed_at) = 1 THEN '1일 전' ELSE FLOOR(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(V.viewed_at)) || '일 전' END AS "viewedAt" FROM tbl_viewed_posting V JOIN tbl_job_posting P ON V.fk_job_id = P.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON P.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid WHERE V.fk_memberid = #{memberId} ORDER BY V.viewed_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_member SET community_company_name = #{companyName}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE memberid = #{memberId}
